nasb.text: There are three things which are stately in their march, Even four which are stately when they walk:

esv.text: Three things are stately in their tread; four are stately in their stride:

cnv.text: 步伐威武的東西有三樣， 連行走威武的，共有四樣：

ccb.text: 步履威武的有三样， 走路雄壮的共有四样：

csbs.text: 有三样东西，它们脚步威武； 连同行走威武的共有四样，
